# init(username:service:)

**Initializer**

Returns a [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNInstantMessageAddress] object initialized with the specified user name and service.

## Declaration

```swift
init(username: String, service: String)
```

## Parameters

- **username**: The user name with which to initialize the [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNInstantMessageAddress] object.
- **service**: The service with which to Initialize the [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNInstantMessageAddress] object.

## Return Value

The initialized [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNInstantMessageAddress] object with the specified user name and service.

## Discussion

User name and service are required to initialize [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNInstantMessageAddress] object.
